expressions.adf_expression: @if(not(equals(mod(div(add(mul(int(pipeline().parameters.count), 6), int(pipeline().parameters.increment)), int(pipeline().parameters.divisor)), 2), 0)), concat('odd/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/', substring(activity('Lookup').output.firstRow.config_value, 0, 4)), concat('even/', pipeline().parameters.env, '/', substring(activity('Lookup').output.firstRow.config_value, 0, 4)))

@if(equals(pipeline().parameters.env, 'prod'), concat('abfss://', pipeline().parameters.container, '@', pipeline().parameters.account, '.dfs.core.windows.net/curated'), concat('abfss://', pipeline().parameters.container, '@', pipeline().parameters.account, '.dfs.core.windows.net/dev'))
